Package neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting.nonlinearparameterfitting

Class LevenbergMarquardtResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting.nonlinearparameterfitting.LevenbergMarquardtResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class LevenbergMarquardtResult extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable result from a Levenberg-Marquardt parameter fitting run.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa
See Also:

      • Constant Field Values

      private final LevenbergMarquardtResult.ConvergenceReason convergenceReason

    • iterations

      private final int iterations

    • finalChiSquare

      private final double finalChiSquare

    • gradientNorm

      private final double gradientNorm

    • correlationMatrix

      private final double[][] correlationMatrix

      private final double[] parameterStandardErrors

  • Constructor Details

    • LevenbergMarquardtResult

      public LevenbergMarquardtResult(LevenbergMarquardtResult.ConvergenceReason convergenceReason, int iterations, double finalChiSquare, double gradientNorm, Jama.Matrix covarianceMatrix, Jama.Matrix correlationMatrix, double[] parameterStandardErrors)
      Creates a Levenberg-Marquardt result.
      Parameters:
      convergenceReason - reason why the optimizer stopped
      iterations - number of solver iterations performed
      finalChiSquare - final weighted chi-square value
      gradientNorm - final norm of the weighted gradient vector
      covarianceMatrix - fitted-parameter covariance matrix, or null if unavailable
      correlationMatrix - fitted-parameter correlation matrix, or null if unavailable
      parameterStandardErrors - fitted-parameter standard errors, or null if unavailable

  • Method Details

    • notRun

      public static LevenbergMarquardtResult notRun()
      Creates an initial result for an optimizer that has not run.
      Returns:
      a result with LevenbergMarquardtResult.ConvergenceReason.NOT_RUN

    • getConvergenceReason

      public LevenbergMarquardtResult.ConvergenceReason getConvergenceReason()
      Returns the convergence reason.
      Returns:
      reason why the optimizer stopped

    • isConverged

      public boolean isConverged()
      Returns whether the optimizer converged successfully.
      Returns:
      true if the convergence reason is successful

    • getIterations

      public int getIterations()
      Returns the number of solver iterations performed.
      Returns:
      iteration count

    • getFinalChiSquare

      public double getFinalChiSquare()
      Returns the final weighted chi-square value.
      Returns:
      final chi-square

    • getGradientNorm

      public double getGradientNorm()
      Returns the final norm of the weighted gradient vector.
      Returns:
      gradient norm

    • getCovarianceMatrix

      public Jama.Matrix getCovarianceMatrix()
      Returns a copy of the fitted-parameter covariance matrix.
      Returns:
      covariance matrix, or null if unavailable

    • getCorrelationMatrix

      public Jama.Matrix getCorrelationMatrix()
      Returns a copy of the fitted-parameter correlation matrix.
      Returns:
      correlation matrix, or null if unavailable

    • getCovarianceMatrixArray

      public double[][] getCovarianceMatrixArray()
      Returns a copy of the fitted-parameter covariance matrix array.
      Returns:
      covariance matrix values, or null if unavailable

    • getCorrelationMatrixArray

      public double[][] getCorrelationMatrixArray()
      Returns a copy of the fitted-parameter correlation matrix array.
      Returns:
      correlation matrix values, or null if unavailable

    • getParameterStandardErrors

      public double[] getParameterStandardErrors()
      Returns fitted-parameter standard errors.
      Returns:
      parameter standard errors, or null if unavailable

    • matrixToArray

      private static double[][] matrixToArray(Jama.Matrix matrix)
      Copies matrix values into an array.
      Parameters:
      matrix - matrix to copy
      Returns:
      copied matrix values, or null if matrix is null

    • copyMatrixArray

      private static double[][] copyMatrixArray(double[][] matrix)
      Copies a matrix array.
      Parameters:
      matrix - matrix array to copy
      Returns:
      copied matrix array, or null if matrix is null

    • copyArray

      private static double[] copyArray(double[] values)
      Copies an array.
      Parameters:
      values - values to copy
      Returns:
      copied values, or null if values is null
